    ON THE PURSUIT OF CREATING

    Better Smiles

    Welcome to Alberta Dental, where nearly 12 years of dedicated

    service meet the pursuit of creating better smiles for our valued patients. We are thrilled to introduce you to a clinic that goes

    beyond providing dental care; we prioritize your comfort,

    convenience, and the quality of service you deserve.

    ABOUT US

    Alberta Dental is strategically located in Los Algodones, B.C., Mexico, just a few steps from the border. We take pride in being an All Specialties, One Clinic, equipped with a team of highly qualified dentists, each specializing in various fields such as Endodontics, Maxillofacial Surgery, Pediatric Dentistry, Periodontics, Prosthodontics, and Implantology.
     

    What Sets Us Apart:

    ​

     - Convenience in Every Transaction:

    We understand the importance of hassle-free experiences. At Alberta Dental, we offer easy and secure transaction options, allowing you to avoid carrying cash.


    - Hassle-free Transportation Services:

    Enjoy our convenient transportation services from Yuma to our clinic and back, minimizing the inconvenience of border crossings. We strive to make your entire dental journey as seamless and stress-free as possible.


    - Direct Communication Channels:

    Stay connected effortlessly through our user-friendly website, www.albertadentalclinic.com. Our patient coordinators are readily available to assist you, ensuring seamless communication with clinic personnel and your assigned dentist.


    - No Cost Virtual Consultation:

    Get ahead with pre-estimates and treatment information through our no-compromise, no-charge virtual consultation. Meet your dentist virtually, allowing you to make informed decisions about your dental care from the comfort of your home.
     

    Your well-being is at the forefront of our mission, and we are dedicated to making your dental journey comfortable and stress-free. Explore our comprehensive range of services, and when you're ready, don't hesitate to reach out to our patient coordinators for any assistance or to schedule a consultation.

    If you have any questions or would like to schedule a consultation, please do not hesitate to contact us. We look forward to being a part of your journey to a healthier, happier smile.

    OUR SERVICES

    We offer a comprehensive range of dental treatments designed to meet your needs, from routine cleanings to more complex procedures. Explore our services and feel free to ask any questions. If you need more personalized guidance, our patient coordinators are always ready to guide you find the right solution for your dental health.

    HOW TO SCHEDULE?

    Shuttle Service

    We provide transportation to our clinic, to make your visit easier. Our shuttle picks you up and brings you directly to the clinic, so you don’t have to worry about directions or parking.
    *Restrictions may apply

    ​

    Monday – Saturday: 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM

    Availability may vary depending on route and distance.
